Solutions for You

Custom websites. POS integration. Built for small businesses.

Get Started In Production

Services

We serve all independent businesses — from solo operators to multi-location restaurants. Pick the plan that fits your needs.

Solo Operator

$1,500 - $2,000

Perfect for independent service professionals who need an online presence and booking system.

  • Modern website with your branding
  • Online appointment scheduling system
  • Payment integration (Stripe/Square)
  • Automated email/SMS confirmations
  • Mobile responsive design
  • Up to 2 weeks turnaround
  • 30 days post-launch support

Best for: Nail salons, barbershops, hair stylists, massage therapists, tattoo artists, personal trainers, etc.

Website Only

$3,500 - $4,000

  • Custom modern design
  • Menu integration with your database
  • English/Spanish language toggle
  • Mobile responsive & Fast loading
  • Social media integration

POS Integration Only

$2,500 - $3,000

  • Connect existing site to POS
  • Order flow setup
  • API integration + authentication
  • Testing & deployment
  • Staff training
Save $1,000

Full Package

$5,500 - $6,500

  • Both services included
  • Complete solution, one vendor
  • Custom site + custom POS orders
  • Seamless end-to-end integration

In Production

Laguna Website & POS Integration

A seamless custom website paired with a full custom management system including automated inventory alerts, strict order tracking, and dynamic delivery routing between all service points.

View Full Breakdown Live Site Live POS
Local Retail Operation

Problem: Needed to build brand credibility and handle variable locations with high volume pre-orders.

Solution: Custom mobile-first site + direct POS integration for pre-orders.

Result: Tripled pre-order volume; built solid brand presence ahead of retail expansion.

Who We Are

Brass Tacks was built by someone who understands exactly how modern businesses operate.

We combine deep technical expertise with hands-on industry knowledge. We aren't an agency throwing generic templates at you. We know that a missed order or confusing POS flow costs you money, so we build reliable, custom web solutions that solve real operational problems.

Friendly, competent, and focused entirely on making your tech work for you — no BS.

Let's reimagine your business

We solve real problems for small businesses. Custom solutions, fair pricing, no BS.
